calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-173 REM-suppression precision-recalibration confidence-accuracy probe (diagnostic)
items.note: IGW-20260717-207. DIAGNOSTIC probe (excluded from confidence scoring) of MECH-173 on the built MECH-204 REM precision-recalibration consumer (sleep_substrate:GAP-1 done). 4 arms x 3 seeds: FULL_SLEEP / REM_SUPPRESSED (rem_enabled=F, medication model) / RECALIB_OFF (isolates MECH-123 precision recalibration) / SWS_SUPPRESSED (selectivity control). Load-bearing statistic overconfidence_score=log(true_forward_model_error/mean_running_variance) with an independent accuracy signal (e3_prediction_error) -> not synthetic. P0 readiness gate self-routes substrate_not_ready if rv not live or the F1 recalibration lever never engages; sub-threshold cross-arm spread self-routes substrate_ceiling (-> /implement-substrate Phase 7 per 541c). GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout (cross-arm overconfidence_score under REM/recalib ablation) absent from all recorded manifests (no MECH-173 runs; 541 measured rv setpoint divergence, not this 4-arm calibration signature) -> run. re-derive brake clear (0 substrate_ceiling autopsies on MECH-173).

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 H2: metabolic forage-to-survive (env reward-coupling) discrimination
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 MECH-457 discrimination portfolio leg, routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-769_2026-07-17 (769 capacity-amend REGRESSED raw ON 6.48->0.12; capacity axis EMPIRICALLY FALSIFIED). DIAGNOSTIC (excluded from governance scoring); PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING -> /failure-autopsy adjudication, read jointly with the sibling legs. RE-DERIVE BRAKE (6 prior non_contributory MECH-457 autopsies) PERMITS this: NEW EXQ number on a DIFFERENT design axis -- the GOV-FANOUT-1 route the 769 autopsy re_derive_brake.route_to names (the brake refuses only another capacity/same-axis re-pose). GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout absent from all prior manifests (769 ran the capacity build, not this axis manipulation) -> run. No in-flight approach-before-avoidance ordering falsifier covers H1 (verified: queue empty, no evidence, autopsy declares H1 UNTESTED) -> all three legs kept. Reference (non-regressed) capacity 128-wide/3x/z_world-detached (NOT the 769-falsified 256/5x). MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending; INV-088 re-routes onto the portfolio outcome. On D3 the passive-survival optimum is learned SELF-CONTAMINATION-AVOIDANCE (footprint->contaminated_harm), not 'do nothing'. H2 (axis=environment): ctrl=standard D3 / decouple=contamination-off-no-starvation (ALIASING control) / treat=metabolic (contamination-off + energy->health starvation; survival REQUIRES foraging, verified oracle+local_view survive 200/forage ~60, random+passive die). Verdict treat clears lift target AND beats DECOUPLE by margin (isolates reward-coupling from contamination-removal). NULL: treat no lift -> reward-coupling NOT the wall. Metabolic env = experiment-layer PROBE (mech457_probe_envs), NOT ree_core (769 substrate action=none); a WIN routes /implement-substrate. Dry-run PASS; validate --strict OK; ASCII-clean.

items.title: MECH-076 residue-as-terrain-deformation: basin-geometry dose-response (evidence)
items.note: IGW-20260717-204 MECH-076 basin-geometry dose-response (evidence, wall-independent). evidence_class=mechanistic_partial. Smoke seed-level PASS; validate --strict OK.

items.title: MECH-063 orthogonal control-plane axes rank-2 behavioural falsifier
items.note: IGW-20260717-203 / EVB-0204. FIRST real experimental evidence for MECH-063 (control plane retains ORTHOGONAL tonic/phasic axes rather than collapsing into one scalar); provisional, lit_only_above_cap + low_exp_conf + synthetic_signals_only. EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=evidence (weights confidence). DESIGN: 2x2 factorial telemetry probe (NO training) on the REAL production E3 select() path -- MECH-320 tonic_vigor (SCORE axis, additive action-vs-noop bias; forced live via tonic_vigor_v_t_floor=0.5, noop_class=4) x MECH-313 noise_floor (TEMPERATURE axis, effective_T=2.0). These route to two DISTINCT softmax parameters (score_bias=location vs temperature=spread). READOUTS per fresh E3 selection (read-only candidate-capture wrapper aligned to e3.last_precommit_probs): E=normalised precommit entropy, D=precommit mass on non-noop candidates. LOAD-BEARING C1 (rank-2): standardised 2x2 main-effect vectors v_temp,v_score non-collinear |sin angle|>0.5 on >=4/5 seeds AND robust (mean-SD>0.5) => control is NOT one scalar => supports; parallel vectors => weakens (collapse toward one scalar). P0 readiness self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory, NOT a false weakens) if either axis silent / undersampled / no headroom -- guards the false-collapse trap. Addresses synthetic_signals_only: prior V3-EXQ-164a built a SYNTHETIC control_vec from harm_obs; this drives real regulators. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout (behavioural rank of the 2-axis effect matrix) absent from all manifests -- V3-EXQ-650 measured only the WITHIN-MECH-320 C_time/G_vigor collapse (claim_ids=[], different question) -> run. Re-derive brake: 0 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsies on MECH-063 -> not braked. VALIDATION: validate_experiments --strict OK; dry-run smoke end-to-end PASS (readiness gate correctly self-routes requeue on undersized dry-run); full-scale seed-11 inline PASS (readiness met, sin_angle=0.93>0.5, entropy lift +0.30 temp-axis, noop-mass suppression score-axis). Mint-as-you-go: OFF arms emit cross-driver reusable fingerprints (include_driver_script_in_hash=False). ASCII-clean.
